div.head: The Secretary of State to the Minister in China (MacMurray)
div.p: 182. Your 24, January 12, 10 a.m. For your information. Radio Corporation informs Department that as result of American communications of October last to Japanese and Chinese Government[s] it had felt encouraged to continue support of Federal Telegraph Company of Delaware, but that it now feels that it cannot continue such support much longer. Department is requesting Japanese Embassy to reply to memorandum of October 28 last.Ibid., p. 1082. Please report present situation and prospects for any future action by Peking authorities.
